title: XtreamCloud Minecraft-themed hosting frontend (auth, plans, UPI QR, panel)

requirements.summary: Create the XtreamCloud site shell, routing, and consistent Minecraft-inspired purple/black theme with prominent branding across pages.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages use a consistent purple/black Minecraft-inspired visual style
All user-facing text is in English

file_operations.description: Create the application shell with a persistent header (prominent "XtreamCloud" branding), primary navigation links (Auth, Plans, Panel), and route outlet wiring. Use shadcn-ui components for consistent layout primitives and interactive elements; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add client-side routing for Page A (Auth), Page B (Plans), Payment flow, and Page C (Panel), including default redirects that align with the requested user journey.

Add global styling entry point to implement the Minecraft-inspired purple/black palette, consistent typography/spacing, and reusable utility classes. Ensure all text styles remain readable in dark theme.
Extend Tailwind theme tokens (colors/radii/shadows) to support the purple/black Minecraft-inspired look consistently across the app (without adding new global stylesheet paths).
Ensure the document title and metadata align with the XtreamCloud branding and the app remains English-only for user-facing text.

requirements.summary: Implement Page A authentication UI with Register/Login modes (ID + password), session detection, and an "Already logged in?" route-to-Plans action.
acceptanceCriteria: User can register with ID + password and then log in with the same credentials
If the user is already authenticated, they are automatically routed to Page B (Plans) without needing to log in again
An "Already logged in?" button/link exists and routes to Page B when a session exists

file_operations.description: Create Page A with two modes (Register/Login) using ID + password fields, clear English validation/error messages, and an "Already logged in?" control. Use shadcn-ui form components (e.g., inputs, buttons, tabs/cards) to keep styling consistent; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Implement a simple frontend session mechanism to support ID/password registration/login flows and session detection for automatic navigation (store minimal session state in browser storage; no secrets).
Wire the Auth page route and add guards/redirects so that when an active session is detected, the user is automatically routed to Page B (Plans).

Add navigation wiring and header controls that reflect auth state (e.g., show Auth vs. Plans/Panel access) and ensure the "Already logged in?" behavior can route to Plans when a session exists. Use shadcn-ui buttons/menus where applicable; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Create Page B (Plans) showing the four specified plans with exact pricing/specs and ORDER NOW actions that start payment.
acceptanceCriteria: Plans page shows all four plans with the exact names, prices, and specs
Each plan has an "ORDER NOW" button that initiates the payment step

file_operations.description: Implement the Plans page UI listing HEXO (₹80/MONTH), METEOR (₹280/MONTH), DOOMSDAY (₹850/MONTH), XTREME (₹950/MONTH) with exact specs as provided and an "ORDER NOW" button per plan. Use shadcn-ui card/button components for consistent presentation; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add lightweight client state (and persistence) to store the currently selected plan for the payment flow and subsequent Panel rendering.
Register the Plans route and wire "ORDER NOW" navigation to the payment route while carrying the selected plan context.

requirements.summary: Implement payment UI to select UPI app type and display QR code + UPI details for the chosen plan upon Pay.
acceptanceCriteria: User can select one of: PhonePe, Google Pay, Paytm, UPI
Clicking Pay displays a QR code and UPI details (UPI ID / payment string) for the selected plan
The payment UI clearly indicates which plan is being paid for

file_operations.description: Create the payment page that shows the selected plan summary, allows choosing PhonePe/Google Pay/Paytm/UPI, and on Pay displays a QR code plus UPI payment details (UPI ID and payment string) in English. Use shadcn-ui radio/select/button/card components for consistent UI; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add utilities to build a UPI payment string for the selected plan and chosen app label, and provide the data needed for QR rendering.
Add a reusable QR rendering component that can display a QR for the computed UPI payment string and gracefully handles invalid/empty data.
Register the Payment route and ensure navigation from Plans and forward navigation to the Panel after the user indicates payment completion (per non-goal: no automatic verification).

requirements.summary: Create Page C (Hosting Panel) accessible after the payment flow, showing purchased plan resources and a process info section (simulated if needed).
acceptanceCriteria: After completing the payment flow, the user is routed to the Hosting Panel (Page C)
Hosting Panel displays the selected plan and its allocated resources (RAM/CPU/SSD GB)
Hosting Panel includes a section labeled for process info (e.g., process status/summary) and displays data (even if simulated)

file_operations.description: Implement the Hosting Panel page to load the user's purchased plan (prefer querying backend capability when available, with a client-side fallback), display RAM/CPU/SSD allocation clearly, and show a labeled "Process info" section with simulated status/summary data. Use shadcn-ui components for consistent sections/cards/badges; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create a frontend hook to read the purchased plan for the current user context (using backend interface methods when present, and falling back to locally stored order state after payment completion).
Register the Panel route and add guard logic so it is only accessible after payment completion (based on persisted purchase state), otherwise redirect to Plans.

requirements.summary: Include Minecraft-inspired static logo and hero background assets from frontend/public/assets/generated and render them in the UI (no backend image serving).
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated and are used in the UI
The UI uses the logo in the header and the background in at least the landing/auth experience

file_operations.description: Add the generated Minecraft-inspired pixel/block-style XtreamCloud logo as a static frontend asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/xtreamcloud-logo.dim_512x512.png.
Add the generated Minecraft-inspired dark hero background as a static frontend asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/xtreamcloud-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png.

Render the static logo asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/xtreamcloud-logo.dim_512x512.png prominently in the header and ensure page titles include "XtreamCloud". Use shadcn-ui layout components as needed; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Apply the static hero background from frontend/public/assets/generated/xtreamcloud-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png to the Auth experience (landing/auth) while keeping text contrast accessible. Use shadcn-ui container/card components for readable overlay; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire global CSS to support the hero background usage and Minecraft-inspired styling motifs (blocky panels, subtle pixel-like borders) while maintaining the purple/black palette.
